ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the flight */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the flight */,
  "day_of_week" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1=Sunday, 7=Saturday) */,
  "airline" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline operating the flight */,
  "origin_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the origin airport */,
  "destination_airport" TEXT /* IATA code of the destination airport */,
  "scheduled_departure" TEXT /* Scheduled departure time */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Actual departure time */,
  "departure_delay" INTEGER /* Departure delay in minutes */,
  "air_time" INTEGER /* Air time in minutes */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance in miles */,
  "scheduled_arrival" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Actual arrival time */,
  "arrival_delay" INTEGER /* Arrival delay in minutes */,
  "cancelled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flight was cancelled (0=no, 1=yes) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique flight number */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the flight (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number at the origin and destination airports */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "cargo_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the cargo in pounds */,
  "crew_count" INTEGER /* Number of crew members on the flight */,
  "security_check_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for security checks in minutes */,
  "boarding_time" INTEGER /* Time taken for boarding in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_origin_airport FOREIGN KEY ("origin_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline FOREIGN KEY ("airline") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_airport FOREIGN KEY ("destination_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airline */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for customer service */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* City where the airline's headquarters is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* The airline's official website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* The year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* The total number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  "operating_countries" TEXT /* A comma-separated list of countries where the airline operates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Full name of the airport */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the airport is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the airport is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* The timezone of the airport */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* The latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* The longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* The elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "terminal_count" INTEGER /* The number of terminals at the airport */,
  "annual_passenger_traffic" INTEGER /* The annual passenger traffic at the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancelled_flights" (
  "cancel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancelled flight record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of cancellation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation */,
  "rescheduled_flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rescheduled flight, if applicable */,
  "rescheduled_date" TEXT /* Date of the rescheduled flight */,
  "rescheduled_time" TEXT /* Time of the rescheduled flight */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the cancellation was notified to passengers */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to passengers due to cancellation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancelled_flights_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_delays" (
  "delay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delay record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight that experienced the delay */,
  "delay_time" INTEGER /* Total delay time in minutes */,
  "delay_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the delay */,
  "delay_code" TEXT /* A code representing the type of delay */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to recover from the delay in minutes */,
  "compensation_amount" TEXT /* Amount of compensation provided to passengers due to the delay */,
  "delay_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the delay on the overall flight schedule (e.g., Minor, Major, Critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_delays_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
